response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time
ATTR scheduled_arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_code : varchar
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1..N : FK=crew_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_id
